'''鈭歝h-g-dh''' ('''chagadhasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nab|nab]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nab|nab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-g-dh
|-
! Lemma
| chagadhasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chagadhithi|chagadhithi]] || [[word:chagadhiji|chagadhiji]] || [[word:chagadhishi|chagadhishi]] || [[word:chagadhi|chagadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chagadhuthuth|chagadhuthuth]] || [[word:chagadhujuj|chagadhujuj]] || [[word:chagadhushush|chagadhushush]] || [[word:chagadh|chagadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chagadhuthu|chagadhuthu]] || [[word:chagadhuju|chagadhuju]] || [[word:chagadhushu|chagadhushu]] || [[word:chagadhu|chagadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chagadhufuth|chagadhufuth]] || [[word:chagadhufuj|chagadhufuj]] || [[word:chagadhufush|chagadhufush]] || [[word:chagadhuf|chagadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chagadhethe|chagadhethe]] || [[word:chagadheje|chagadheje]] || [[word:chagadheshe|chagadheshe]] || [[word:chagadhe|chagadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chagadhothoth|chagadhothoth]] || [[word:chagadhojoj|chagadhojoj]] || [[word:chagadhoshosh|chagadhoshosh]] || [[word:chagadh|chagadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chagadhotho|chagadhotho]] || [[word:chagadhojo|chagadhojo]] || [[word:chagadhosho|chagadhosho]] || [[word:chagadho|chagadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chagadhofoth|chagadhofoth]] || [[word:chagadhofoj|chagadhofoj]] || [[word:chagadhofosh|chagadhofosh]] || [[word:chagadhof|chagadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chagadh忙th忙|chagadh忙th忙]] || [[word:chagadh忙j忙|chagadh忙j忙]] || [[word:chagadh忙sh忙|chagadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:chagadh忙|chagadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chagadhathath|chagadhathath]] || [[word:chagadhajaj|chagadhajaj]] || [[word:chagadhashash|chagadhashash]] || [[word:chagadh|chagadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chagadhatha|chagadhatha]] || [[word:chagadhaja|chagadhaja]] || [[word:chagadhasha|chagadhasha]] || [[word:chagadha|chagadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chagadhafath|chagadhafath]] || [[word:chagadhafaj|chagadhafaj]] || [[word:chagadhafash|chagadhafash]] || [[word:chagadhaf|chagadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:chagadhasha|chagadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochagadhasha|gochagadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichagadhasha|gokichagadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:chagadhn眉sha|chagadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochagadhnkn眉sha|gochagadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichagadhn眉sha|gokichagadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chagadhsh毛sha|chagadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochagadhnksh毛sha|gochagadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichagadhsh毛sha|gokichagadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chagadhrosha|chagadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochagadhnkrosha|gochagadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichagadhrosha|gokichagadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chagadhmusha|chagadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochagadhnkmusha|gochagadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichagadhmusha|gokichagadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:chagadhsherasha|chagadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochagadhnksherasha|gochagadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichagadhsherasha|gokichagadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:chagadhngasha|chagadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochagadhnkngasha|gochagadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichagadhngasha|gokichagadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chagadhyasha|chagadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochagadhnkyasha|gochagadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichagadhyasha|gokichagadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:chagadhyamasha|chagadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochagadhnkyamasha|gochagadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichagadhyamasha|gokichagadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:chagadhn眉sh毛sha|chagadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochagadhnkn眉sh毛sha|gochagadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichagadhn眉sh毛sha|gokichagadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chagadhn眉rosha|chagadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochagadhnkn眉rosha|gochagadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichagadhn眉rosha|gokichagadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chagadhn眉musha|chagadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochagadhnkn眉musha|gochagadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichagadhn眉musha|gokichagadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:chagadhsh毛n眉sha|chagadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochagadhnksh毛n眉sha|gochagadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichagadhsh毛n眉sha|gokichagadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chagadhsh毛rosha|chagadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochagadhnksh毛rosha|gochagadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichagadhsh毛rosha|gokichagadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chagadhsh毛musha|chagadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochagadhnksh毛musha|gochagadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichagadhsh毛musha|gokichagadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:chagadhron眉sha|chagadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochagadhnkron眉sha|gochagadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichagadhron眉sha|gokichagadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:chagadhrosh毛sha|chagadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochagadhnkrosh毛sha|gochagadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichagadhrosh毛sha|gokichagadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chagadhromusha|chagadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochagadhnkromusha|gochagadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichagadhromusha|gokichagadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:chagadhmun眉sha|chagadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochagadhnkmun眉sha|gochagadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichagadhmun眉sha|gokichagadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:chagadhmush毛sha|chagadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochagadhnkmush毛sha|gochagadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichagadhmush毛sha|gokichagadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:chagadhmurosha|chagadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochagadhnkmurosha|gochagadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichagadhmurosha|gokichagadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:chagadh|chagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙g忙dh|ch忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochagadh|hochagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙g忙dh|hoch忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochagadh|hohochagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙g忙dh|hohoch忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉chagadh|n眉chagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙g忙dh|n眉ch忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉chagadh|n眉n眉chagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙g忙dh|n眉n眉ch忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂chagadh|n茂chagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙g忙dh|n茂ch忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂chagadh|n茂n茂chagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙g忙dh|n茂n茂ch忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchagadh|luchagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙g忙dh|luch忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchagadh|luluchagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙g忙dh|luluch忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichagadh|lichagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙g忙dh|lich忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichagadh|lilichagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙g忙dh|lilich忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochagadh|kochagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙g忙dh|koch忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochagadh|kokochagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙g忙dh|kokoch忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechagadh|kechagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙g忙dh|kech忙g忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechagadh|kekechagadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙g忙dh|kekech忙g忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
